meaning: adj.不可征服的,克服不了的,压制不了的
examples: And love, and man's unconquerable mind.
It is loyalty, elegance, fight, success, and unconquerable essence.
Real difficulties can be overcome; it is only the imaginary ones that are unconquerable.
Clara Furse's ravishing--but hitherto unconquerable--London Stock Exchange is hardly sitting a corner crying heigh ho!
We hold them up as an example of unconquerable nature even as we applaud the daredevils and power-brokers who conquer them.
